original_text: ### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked. **Layout (explicit):** - **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images. - **Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line. - **Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px. **Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical. **Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals. ## MJML ```xml Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯ ``` If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Preserve the signature gradient CTA banner while ensuring it remains visually and functionally consistent when image backgrounds fail.
rules.rule_text: Use the Gradient Callout CTA as a full-width 600px banner with one centered headline in the top third and one centered button stacked below in the lower-middle. Use the branded gradient PNG as its centered, cover, no-repeat section background with Sunshine fallback (#faa31b). The headline is Brand Blue (#00529b), Nunito Sans ExtraBold at approximately 28px, and one line. The button is 248 × 64px, Deep Blue (#003D74) with a white Nunito Sans ExtraBold 18px label and a Gold (#FFC20E) › arrow after two non-breaking spaces. Its asymmetric 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px radius is mandatory on every instance: never simplify, reorder corners, or round decimals. The background image may be omitted only for plain-text/AMP fallback, clients stripping all images, or a hard size budget; remove only the image URL/size/repeat/position properties and retain the Sunshine fallback plus every headline, button, and radius rule.

quotes: - **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images.
- **Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

- **Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
**Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical.

rules.intent: Bind the [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule table values verbatim.
rules.rule_text:
The [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule table is a closed, brand-approved set; every row binds its listed values exactly as specified. Do not invent or alter rows.

| item | value |
|---|---|
| Background | the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images. |
| Headline | Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line. |
| Button | centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px. **Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical. |
